title: Introvert in Disguise | Funny Relatable Anti-Social T-Shirt for Every Day Humor
description:
Some people might think you're sociable, but it's all a ruse. This shirt announces your true identity as the socially anti-social introvert everyone secretly loves. Why make small talk when your shirt can do the talking? With clean design and sharp humor, it’s the perfect conversation starter for when you'd rather not start a conversation. 

**Perfect for:**
- Introverts who need their personal space but still love a good joke.
- Anyone guilty of pretending to like parties but secretly plotting their escape.
- Gifting to that friend who’s always “busy” (watching Netflix alone).

**DETAILS:**
- Bold, minimalist text design featuring “Introvert in Disguise” with a subtle, cheeky flair.
- Offered in two print variants: crisp dark ink for light shirts and vibrant neon fills for dark shirts.
- Made-to-order on high-quality materials with a unisex fit that works for any crowd—or no crowd at all.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
